creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
(In reply to Chad Jacob Milios from comment #38)

fyi, simply removing files/patch-src_sljit_sljitConfigInternal.h gave me a successful build of pcre2-10.45 sufficient to again run my git-2.48.1 which was built against pcre2-10.43 (at least `git log -p` worked so far)
